selection_without_outcomes.economic_reason: a positive month-over-month change in nominal retail sales indicates stronger aggregate consumer demand and favors SPY's broader cyclical exposure, while a nonpositive change favors QQQ's longer-duration growth exposure
selection_without_outcomes.independent_mechanism_statement: this is a demand-side retail-sales allocation using official Census RSAFS real-time history; it is distinct from the supply-side industrial-production Cycle 17 and all rate, inflation-expectation, volatility, credit, commodity, currency and calendar mechanisms

signal.source: U.S. Census Bureau Advance Monthly Sales for Retail and Food Services, series RSAFS, distributed through official FRED/ALFRED real-time-period history
signal.formula: at each decision cutoff, choose the latest available revision for the newest available RSAFS reference month and for its exact preceding calendar month; delta_t=current_level-previous_level in millions of U.S. dollars
signal.target_rule: positive delta_t means SPY weight 1.0; equal or negative delta_t means QQQ weight 1.0
signal.availability_rule: ALFRED realtime_start_date becomes conservatively available only at 23:59:59.999999 America/New_York; values later than the frozen cutoff are excluded
signal.missing_rule: fail closed; no interpolation, carry-forward, seasonal reprocessing, inflation adjustment, ex-auto or control-group substitution, year-over-year transform, magnitude threshold, persistence, smoothing, moving average, price filter, volatility filter, grid or source blending
signal.ancestry_limitation: RSAFS is nominal and can move because of both real demand and prices; this confounding limitation is frozen and no prior outcome may change the rule

timing_and_account.signal_freeze: 20:05 America/New_York after the final accepted XNYS close preceding the next monthly execution session
timing_and_account.target_submission: 09:00 America/New_York on the next accepted XNYS session
timing_and_account.holding: until the following monthly accepted execution open
timing_and_account.decision_price: raw preceding-session close for each asset, available before target submission
timing_and_account.comparator: 50/50 SPY/QQQ rebalanced at identical monthly opens under identical whole-share, cost, calendar, lifecycle and corporate-action accounting

splits.cross_boundary_rule: no signal or portfolio state carries across splits

state_support_before_outcomes.minimums: 20 intervals, four of each state, and two transitions in each direction per split

gates: strategy terminal net wealth strictly above the 50/50 comparator
arithmetic mean paired monthly active return strictly positive
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than the 50/50 comparator
validation.failure_rule: holdout remains unopened and the lineage closes permanently

gates: strategy terminal net wealth strictly above the 50/50 comparator
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than the 50/50 comparator
uncentered type-7 0.0000000476837158203125 lower bound strictly positive

bootstrap.method: paired circular moving-block bootstrap over monthly active returns
bootstrap.p_value: (1 + centered-null means at least observed mean)/(32000000 + 1)
bootstrap.limitation: the three-month block is an outcome-blind dependence assumption, not proof of complete serial-dependence coverage

source_identities.runner_role: branch-only removable one-use research adapter; not shared infrastructure
